title: bauhinia ornata var. kerrii
intro: Bauhinia ornata var. kerrii, commonly known as the Thai orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia ornata var. kerrii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
